opinion.h4: McCANN, DISTRICT ATTORNEY OF MILWAUKEE COUNTY v. BABBITZ APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE EASTERN DISTRICT OF WISCONSIN No. 297. Decided October 12, 1970
opinion.p: The appeal is dismissed. Mitchell v. Donovan, 398 U.S. 427, and Gunn v. University Committee to End the War in Viet Nam, 399 U.S. 383.
